text.zh: GAT 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: GAT is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: GAT 用对邻居的学习型注意力替代固定图聚合权重。这让每个节点能够决定哪些邻居对自身表示最重要。
text.en: GAT replaced fixed graph aggregation weights with learned attention over neighbors. This let each node decide which neighbors mattered most for its representation.
